case_title: ZAHID SHAIKH VS. JOHN GLENN RANES ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA NAZARETH HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANES, JOHN GLENN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 556 JONES STREET UNIT 307, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
